name: Jiace Zhu
affiliation: Shanghai Jiao Tong University Global College
bio: Jiace Zhu is a Ph.D. student at Shanghai Jiao Tong University Global College, working with Prof. An Zou. His research focuses on efficient systems for emerging AI and real-time workloads, including large language model inference, CUDA kernel generation, GPU benchmarking, and real-time scheduling on heterogeneous architectures. He manages the CUDABench repository, which is hosted under the CUDA-Bench organization account.

education.degree: Ph.D. in Electronic Science and Technology

education.degree: B.Eng. in Computer Science and Technology

honors.title: Third Place, Embedded System Software Design Contest
